echo_capsule.name: Echo Capsule
echo_capsule.desc: Toss at a weakened wild Harmon to catch it.

fishing_rod.name: Fishing Rod
fishing_rod.desc: Cast at water to fish up wild water Harmons.

revive_capsule.name: Revive Capsule
revive_capsule.desc: Revives a fainted Harmon with half its HP.

evo_capsule.name: Evo Capsule
evo_capsule.desc: Triggers evolution in a Harmon that is ready.
